top_signals.title: House endorses 25-year old rules for rail merger review
top_signals.summary:
Opponents of a controversial transcontinental rail merger hailed the House transportation appropriations committee’s backing of a ‘rigorous’ review of the deal by federal regulators.

The post House endorses 25-year old rules for rail merger review appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: What’s behind Mars UK’s £190M investment in its historic confectionery hub?
top_signals.summary: Over the past decade, UK manufacturing has faced persistent headwinds, from Brexit to Covid and ongoing supply chain disruption. Yet manufacturing still accounts for almost 9 per cent of UK GDP. Set against this backdrop, a major new investment from a global company at its historic Slough factory signals a vote of confidence in UK [...]
